svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Ecosystem Concepts</text>

  <!-- Sun -->
  <circle cx="350" cy="60" r="25" fill="#FFC107" stroke="#FFA000" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>

  <!-- Producers -->
  <rect x="250" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Producers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Primary Consumers -->
  <rect x="180" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="230" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Primary Consumers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Secondary Consumers -->
  <rect x="110" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Secondary Consumers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Decomposers -->
  <rect x="70" y="100" width="100" height="40" fill="#7986CB" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Decomposers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Energy Flow Arrows -->
  <path d="M335,85 L280,120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M280,160 L230,180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M230,220 L180,240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M160,280 L120,240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M120,140 L100,100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Nutrient Cycle Arrow -->
  <path d="M70,120 Q30,80 70,40 Q110,80 70,120" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.6s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <text x="40" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    Nutrient Cycle
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
